top_categories.workout_context: 86ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Eddy Merckx's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
At mile 60 of 101, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At Granfondo Eddy Merckx, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Granfondo Eddy Merckx's paved — Belgian provincial and communal roads forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 101 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Eddy Merckx. Train it until it feels boring.
8,674ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
8,674ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 8,674ft of climbing on paved — Belgian provincial and communal roads does to your power file on race day.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo Eddy Merckx, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved — Belgian provincial and communal roads. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 101 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Granfondo Eddy Merckx’s 101 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo Eddy Merckx requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved — belgian provincial and communal roads to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 101 miles of paved — belgian provincial and communal roads in Andenne, Wallonia, Belgium.
